1.content: How must you serve Buttercup
1.title: How do you come across her

choices: She rubs her feet all over you
My palms need cleaning as well
11.content:
Day and night you worked, tending to the farm. From chopping wood to repairing horse shoes, you had your hands full with work you just didn't enjoy. What made it all worth it was the blonde goddess who'd visit you everyday to command something. Whatever task it was, all you needed to hear were the magic words...

"Oh farmboy, kneel and stare at my soles"

You obey and she rubs her bare soles against each other. There was a thin layer of dirt and the contrast from her palish skin was a marvel.

"Farmboy knead my soles..."

You reach out with your hands to massage them but she abruptly says,

"With your face farmboy, nothing else" she says with a quizzical look on if you're actually gonna do it.

Here feet are fanning up and down and you're still processing her request. You blankly stare at her dirty winkles and a minute goes by.

Suddenly you press your face deeply into her soles and try your best to massage them. Your face is consumed by her feet and after minutes of grinding your face into them, a bit of dirt came onto your face.

"hahaha good work farmboy, good work indeed" she said squishing your face between her soles.

You stay there idle as she toys with your face. Her warm soles on your face make you feel extraordinary.

"Farmboy lick... lick like a good servant"

You obey and spend hours leaving saliva trails along her soles. Her foot mildly resembled a zebra at times because of the saliva making her pale feet parallel to the dirt on her soles. You lapped away, without a thought, just serving her.

Her feet were starting to look clean but there was still a faint layer left.

Suddenly she turns over onto her belly. Her toes scrunch and spread, giving you a pretty good idea on what she wanted.
You ram your face into her soles and insert her toes into your mouth for cleaning. The taste was beyond this world.

"Ahh you're learning farmboy... I must say you are very useful" she said as you continued to worship her feet.

Planting your face in both soles, she moved her soles up and down. She treated your face like a rug, with long wipes that smeared your face.
11.title: Farmboy

choices: She makes him stick his tongue out and uses him as a foot cleaner
She gets a bit more aggressive and stomps down to prove her superiority
She wants him to fetch food for them and feed him with her feet
112.content:
Buttercup sighed as she shifted her feet all over your face, as your kept it firmly planted against her heavenly soft feet. You were amazed by just how smooth and delicate her feet were despite walking barefoot all day. What was even more amazing was the moisture and sweat that heated her amazingly cute feet. With her feet fully licked clean, a playful delighted gleam comes to the gorgeous blond woman's eyes as she shifted onto her back and sat up, gazing at you with her dreamy blue eyes.

"On the floor farmboy. You will be trampled beneath my feet."

Excited to obey her and loving the feeling of dominance and assertion she showed, you didn't hesitate to lay down on the floor right at her feet. This draws a wonderful warm smile from her beautiful face as she watches you with a hint of affection, seeing you a bit more then a simple foot rug. Standing up besides your face, she begins to walk around your head a bit, her saliva coated soles picking up bits of dirt from the ground to give her pale sweaty soles extra texture, wanting to give her farmboy servant extra flavor to work with. She then came right back and hovered one dainty flawless sole right over your head, wiggling her toes a bit teasingly as your eyes trailed along it in a hypnotic manner, craving the feeling of her stepping all over your face. She then planted one dirty sole firmly on your face, smearing off bits more of sweat as a powerful stench began to hit your nose like a tank. Buttercup had a very natural strong scent of hard working feet that was addictive in it's own special way. Lifting her other sole, she balanced on your face for a moment before planting her other foot down on your face, completely smothering it beneath both soles. Despite her entire weight pressing down on your face, she was rather light and the soft texture of her sweaty soles gave it extra cushioning so it didn't cause too much discomfort and pain.

"Hm, you have a rather comfortable face farmboy." She said while playfully tapping your cheek with her beautiful toes, before shifting them over our nose giving them a light pinch before tugging it back a bit, making you take in the intoxicating scent of her feet.

"Be a good servant and open your mouth."

Obeying her every command, you open your lips wide, inviting her foot inside. Flashing one of her dazzling smiles she eased her toes inside your mouth, stretching your mouth wider, filling it with the wonderful sweet honey like taste of her feet. Sucking gently, you ease your tongue around gently as she slides her other free foot over your eyes and nose, her soft sole engulfing your senses as your lips and cheeks squish a bit rather cutely enjoying the facial massaging your face gave. She continues to toy with your face, thrusting her toes in and out rapidly, making your cheeks puff up a bit as she thinks about what to do next. Treating your face like a foot wipe, she grin as she wipes off more saliva smearing off anything from her sole, marking your face with her beautiful foot prints, being able to tell just how much she loved this.
112.title: You will be trampled

info.brief_description: Buttercup's feet are worshipped in different scenarios
info.description:
-Use quotes
-Revolve it around feet, but it can stray off
-Stick to second person
-Please add
